violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed open case of potatoes on the floor in the walk in freezer at time of inspection.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Observed chicken in a pan on water thawing on the counter. Also had meatball on the counter at time of inspection.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Observed hand soap, in meat department, dispenser empty at the time of inspection.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
